rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:7]><unk[4:0:22 71 114 101 101 116 105 110 103 95 48 49]>Hey, be careful walking around down
here.<unk[5:1]> Everything's covered in <Color=red>gloom<Color=white>,<unk[5:0]>
so try to watch your step.
If you do get any gloom on you, use a
<Color=red>sundelion<Color=white>.<unk[5:0]> The base should've told you
to always keep a few on hand.
<unk[4:0:24 84 97 108 107 80 111 115 105 116 105 118 101]>If you don't have any, some time on the
surface should fix you up.<unk[5:0]> I hear those
glowing trees can help too, but I dunno...
<unk[3:0:12]>Anyway, I hope Link comes through here
soon. <unk[5:0]>Pretending to be sick really takes it
out of you.

<unk[3:0:7]>Watch your step around here.<unk[5:0]> The place
is covered in <Color=red>gloom<Color=white>.<PageBreak>If you touch any,<unk[5:0]> you'll need a <Color=red>sundelion<Color=white>
or some time on the surface.

I've heard that those big trees can help
with gloom too, but I haven't been able
to confirm that yet.
<unk[3:0:12]>Anyway, I hope Link comes through here
before too long.<unk[5:0]> I really wanna get back
to the surface.
